Metadata.title: Todijo Marketplace
Metadata.description: Buy and sell products locally and internationally.

Marketplace.title: Find your next favorite product
Marketplace.subtitle: Search real products published by Todijo sellers.

Cart.title: Your cart
Cart.emptyHelp: Discover products offered by Todijo shops.
Cart.secure: Secure payment and shipping address at the next step.

Checkout.title: Complete my order
Checkout.intro: Prices and stock are checked on the server before Stripe opens.
Checkout.stripeDetails: Stripe securely collects your payment and shipping details.
Checkout.notice: Todijo never receives your card details. Your order is paid only after cryptographic confirmation from Stripe.
Checkout.cancelText: The order remains unpaid. You can return to your cart and try again securely.
Checkout.confirmedText: Order {id} was confirmed by the Stripe webhook.
Checkout.verifyingText: Stripe redirected you to Todijo, but the signed webhook has not confirmed payment yet. Refresh shortly.

Dashboard.buyerIntro: Manage your purchases, messages and reviews from your Todijo account.
Dashboard.buyerNote: A buyer account never creates a shop automatically.
Dashboard.openShopText: Your seller account is ready. Complete your shop information to publish products.
Dashboard.sellerNote: Add products, set prices and track stock.

Product.private: Your email address stays private. The conversation takes place on Todijo.
Product.defaultMessage: Hello, is this item still available?
Product.messageError: The message could not be sent.

Seller.manageIntro: Manage items published in your shop.
Seller.noProductsText: Add your first item to start selling.
Seller.settingsIntro: Add your logo, banner and information that reassures customers.
